zh.lifeSummary: 當John Perry II於1644年5月出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親John Perry39歲，母親Johanna Holland28歲。他於1667年12月13日與Sarah Clary在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1724年12月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年80歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Perry II于1644年5月出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲John Perry39岁，母亲Johanna Holland28岁。他于1667年12月13日与Sarah Clary在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1724年12月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年80岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Perry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Herry ‘son of Herry’, a variant of the personal name Harry (see Harris ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a pear tree (Middle English piri(e), peri(e), puri(e), Old English pirige, pyrige), or a habitational name for someone who owned or came from a place so named. This surname and a number of variants have been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

variants.name: Peery
meanings: Irish: variant of   Perry  , taken to Ireland at the time of thePlantation of Ulster and in the Cromwellian period.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Peary
meanings: History: Robert E. Peary (1856–1920) was a U.S.-born explorer, who in 1909 led the first successful expedition to the North Pole. Peary Land in the north of Greenland is named after him, as he explored there in 1892 and 1900.

variants.name: Perrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of Perry 2. Alternatively, perhaps from the Old French personal name Pierre; see Pierce .

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Perryman
meanings: English (Devon): elaborated form of Perry , with Middle English man, probably denoting one who lived near a pear tree; see Pearman .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When John Perry II was born in May 1644, in London, England, his father, John Perry, was 39 and his mother, Johanna Holland, was 28. He married Sarah Clary on 13 December 1667, in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 December 1724, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Perry II est né en mai 1644, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, John Perry, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Johanna Holland, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Clary le 13 décembre 1667, à Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1724, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Perry II im Mai 1644 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Perry 39 und seine Mutter Johanna Holland 28. Er hat am 13. Dezember 1667 in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Clary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1724 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Perry II è nato il nel maggio 1644 nel London, England, il suo padre, John Perry, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Holland, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Clary il 13 dicembre 1667, nel Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1724, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Perry IIが1644年5月にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Perryは39歳，母Johanna Hollandは28歳であった。1667年12月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーワテルトウンでSarah Claryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1724年12月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스
ko.Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: John Perry II(이)가 1644년 5월 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Perry(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Holland(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1667년 12월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운에서 Sarah Clary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1724년 12월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Perry II nasceu em maio de 1644, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Perry, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Holland, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Clary em 13 de dezembro de 1667, em Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1724, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Perry II родился май 1644 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Perry было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Holland, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Clary 13 декабря 1667 г. в местности вэитиртоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 декабря 1724 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Perry II nació en mayo de 1644, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, John Perry, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Johanna Holland, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sarah Clary el 13 de diciembre de 1667, en Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1724, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
